results.title: 2027: LP presents Okereke as presidential candidate
results.description: The Labour Party (LP) has formally presented Dr. Chibuzo Okereke as its presidential candidate for the 2027 general election. The party, in a statement issued by its National Publicity Secretary, Ken Eluma Asogwa, said Okereke emerged through what it described as a broad-based consensus among party members and stakeholders, which was affirmed in Abuja on [...]

results.title: Ministry calls for village protocol safeguards
results.description: The Ministry of iTaukei Affairs and the iTaukei Affairs Board are calling for safeguards to ensure village protocols are respected when health officials enforce new legislation. Acting Permanent Secretary for iTaukei Affairs Josefa Toganivalu says the ministry supports the proposed reforms to improve public health in rural communities. However, he raised concerns about provisions allowing [...]

results.title: Air Raid Sirens Sounded Across Kyiv As Russia Launches Major Attack
results.description: The latest assault comes amid an escalation in Russia's long-range strikes against Ukraine.
